notes_md:
**kề** = next to, right beside (physical position).

It describes two things that are very close with almost no space between them. It usually goes directly before a noun.

**Structure:** kề + noun (kề nhà tôi)

Close synonyms: **cạnh**, **sát** (stronger = very tight). Opposite idea: **xa** (far). It’s often used in slightly more formal or descriptive contexts than *cạnh*.
notes:
kề = next to, right beside (physical position).

It describes two things that are very close with almost no space between them. It usually goes directly before a noun.

Structure: kề + noun (kề nhà tôi)

Close synonyms: cạnh, sát (stronger = very tight). Opposite idea: xa (far). It’s often used in slightly more formal or descriptive contexts than cạnh.
exampleSentences: Nhà của anh nằm ngay kề trường học nên rất thuận tiện.
Em ngồi kề bạn thân trong lớp suốt cả năm học.
Quán cà phê kề cửa hàng sách mà chị thích ghé.
exampleSentencesTranslated: My house is next to the school so it is very convenient.
I sat next to my best friend in class all year.
The coffee shop is next to the bookstore that you like to visit.
